SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-19-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-19-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT EXCEPT ROBERT DETTNER WHO WAS NOT PRESENT; HE WAS REPRESENTED BY HIS SON. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY SANDRA WATTS--PRESIDENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SERVPRO OF THE SUNSET RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DETTNER, DAVID DETTNER, ROBERT $3,513.12 PRINCIPAL, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,813.12 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
